series_metadata.series_description: Permanent Agreements are contracts between agencies and the Ohio Department of Education outlining specific rights and regulations relative to USDA Child Nutrition Programs.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: permanent agreement it is superseded. If an agency is terminated cause, removed from National Disqualified List or State Disqualified List (a minimum of seven years) and/or any outstanding debt is paid USDA; if an appeal is filed ; Electronic: permanent agreement it is superseded. If an agency is terminated cause, removed from National Disqualified List or State Disqualified List (a minimum of seven years) and/or any outstanding debt is paid USDA; if an appeal is filed
